codeReview.summary: The fix resolves the prior blocking review gap. `lib/driver.ml` now funnels the version-floor logic through `parse_go_version_line`, and `test/test_codegen.ml` adds simulated below-minimum, unparseable, simulated-success, and future-version cases while preserving the real `check_go_version_adequate()` success-path test. Given the feature requirement to simulate the old-Go path when the local toolchain cannot actually run an older binary, this is sufficient verification for VAL-CROSS-007.

summary: Reviewed commit `96465c6f308be4b9305d8cc7b4b658e07e95cf82`, the worker transcript skeleton, and the handoff. The rerun closes the original scrutiny failure by directly exercising the unsupported-Go-version branch through the same parsing/comparison logic used by `check_go_version_adequate`, while keeping the real Go 1.26+ success path covered.
